steps.title: Identify the trig ratio
steps.content: In the right triangle, $QS$ is the hypotenuse and the side of length $18$ is opposite angle $Q$. Use sine because sine compares opposite side to hypotenuse.

steps.title: Solve for the hypotenuse
steps.content:
Write the sine ratio and isolate $QS$.
$$\sin Q=\frac{18}{QS}$$
$$QS=\frac{18}{\sin Q}$$
The answer is D.
